name: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad with Feta & Herbs
description: Chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil vinaigrette. Fresh and filling for lunch.

name: Ginger-Soy Turkey Stir-Fry with Market Vegetables
description: Lean turkey strips with bell peppers, broccoli, and light soy-ginger sauce over brown rice.

name: Overnight Oats with Seasonal Berries & Chia
description: Rolled oats soaked in almond milk with chia seeds, topped with mixed berries and a drizzle of honey.

name: Red Lentil Soup with Spinach & Aromatic Spices
description: Hearty red lentil soup with spinach, carrots, and warm spices. Perfect for meal prep.

name: Herb-Roasted Chicken with Caramelized Sweet Potato
description: Herb-baked chicken thigh with roasted sweet potato wedges and steamed green beans.

name: Rustic Chicken & Potato Soup
description: A warming bowl of chicken soup with tender potatoes and vegetables—ideal for cozy nights.

name: Continental Breakfast Plate
description: A relaxed morning plate inspired by a perfect home café—great with your favorite brew.

name: Wok-Seared Beef Fried Rice with Scrambled Egg
description: Classic savory fried rice with tender beef strips and fluffy scrambled eggs.

name: Sesame-Glazed Chicken with Jasmine Rice & Cucumber
description: Bite-sized chicken in a glossy sesame glaze with rice, peas, and fresh cucumber.

name: Crispy Chicken Breast on Mixed Garden Greens
description: Mixed greens with tomatoes and sweet peppers, topped with golden crispy chicken.

name: Pan-Seared Steak with Pommes Purée & Roasted Asparagus
description: Sliced steak with balsamic glaze, creamy mashed potatoes, and charred asparagus.

name: Seared Beef with Broccoli & Honey-Glazed Carrots
description: Pan-seared steak strips with roasted broccoli and glossy glazed carrots.

name: Chargrilled Chicken Brochettes with Seasoned Frites
description: BBQ-glazed chicken skewers with peppers, crispy seasoned fries, and dipping sauce.

name: Chilled Shrimp Salad with Avocado & Citrus Dressing
description: Shrimp with avocado, cherry tomatoes, red onion, cilantro, and lime-forward dressing.

name: Grilled Chicken Bowl with Brown Rice & Garden Vegetables
description: Glazed grilled chicken over brown rice with lettuce, cucumber, and fresh herbs.

name: Beef Tenderloin & Broccoli with Stir-Fry Noodles
description: Thick noodles with beef, broccoli, carrots, and a savory soy-style sauce, sesame finish.

name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken Fusilli with Tzatziki
description: Grilled chicken with rotini, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and tzatziki.

name: Seasonal Berry & Banana Smoothie Bowl with Granola
description: Pink smoothie base topped with granola, nuts, banana, berries, and a mint garnish.

name: Creamy Rotini Pasta Salad with Garden Vegetables
description: Rotini with tomatoes, cucumber, olives, carrot, red onion, and creamy dressing.

name: Avocado Tartine with Soft Scramble & Seasonal Berries
description: Whole-grain avocado toast, fluffy scrambled eggs, and fresh sliced strawberries.

name: Gulf Shrimp & Broccoli in Light Garlic Sauce
description: Juicy shrimp and bright broccoli in a light savory, peppery stir-fry sauce.

name: Antioxidant Berry Smoothie Bowl with Nut Butter
description: Purple berry smoothie base with banana, kiwi, pomegranate, blueberries, citrus, and nut butter.
